prompt: Two images are provided: a flat vector BLUEPRINT (clean solid colors, an empty gold ticket on a celadon field) and a STYLE REFERENCE (an aged voucher with dumplings and text). Re-render the BLUEPRINT in the exact aged chromolithograph print style of the STYLE REFERENCE. Preserve the blueprint's geometry precisely: same ticket size and position, same notched corners, same border structure, and the same key-fret border pattern - each fret unit is a PAIR of spirals facing each other; reproduce that paired form exactly. At each corner of the fret band, one bold continuous hook wraps around the corner and connects flush to both the horizontal and vertical bands - no gaps. Do not add any ornament, elements, text, lettering, food, or decoration of any kind - the large empty gold areas must remain empty gold paper. Do not copy any content from the style reference; use it only for texture and print character. Colors exactly: harvest gold ticket #E0AC45, dark gold ochre borders and fret #8A6B22, celadon field #6F9487, white keyline, cinnabar outer edge #D93A35. Render bright and well-lit: colors must stay vivid and true to these hex values - do not darken, mute, or desaturate, and do not add any dark aging wash. Apply subtle paper grain, slight ink spread, aged print texture, engraved line character - aging gentle and even, no heavy stains or blotches. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism, no 3D, no shadows.
